name: Cleanaway Waste Management Limited
analysis: CWY has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.4000, stop A$2.2374, target A$2.6629 (1.62:1) — then trail it.
